title: SatisfyingMC: Reborn
description: A remaster of SatisfyingMC from the original creator of SatisfyingMC.
body:
**FROM THE CREATOR OF SATISFYINGMC!** I bring an updated version. I deleted the GitHub account that I had originally used for Modrinth (I completely forgot it was being used for Modrinth), so I lost access to the original SatisfyingMC upload. I bring you SatisfyingMC: Reborn, a newer, better SatisfyingMC. Updated (currently 1.21.1), cleaned-up mods directory, and HOPEFULLY better performance.

This modpack aims to be as satisfying as possible, while still providing fun new aspects instead of just being a remaster of vanilla. This modpack does include Nyf's Spiders, Enhanced Visuals, Real Camera, and BetterCombat to satisfy all your mob-slaying needs. It uses Continuity to allow you to use OptiFine connected textures even on Sodium/Iris.

When it comes to actually satisfying features, there's more than just realistic combat and cool sounds. Place fences diagonally AND jump over them, experience awesome animations (including your food items actually gradually being eaten during the eating animation!), and more in SatisfyingMC: Reborn. We hope you enjoy the modpack, and don't forget to join the discord for news.
